decision.value: Use a one-week two-key verification window
decision.evidence: verify against both keys for a week

tradeoff.value: More complex validation limits credential exposure
tradeoff.evidence: complicates validation but limits how long a leaked key works

alternative.evidence: Rotating the Supabase JWT key in place

open_question.value: Whether mobile can refresh before overlap ends
open_question.evidence: mobile refresh before that overlap ends
